description: Fix all architectural issues from review: Create @quant/server shared package to eliminate Router/middleware duplication across 9 apps, fix JWT signature verification at app level by importing TokenService from @quant/auth, fix corsMiddleware signature mismatch in QuantTube, and make all app-level AI services properly delegate to packages/ai services.
steps: Create packages/server/package.json and packages/server/tsconfig.json
Create packages/server/src/index.ts - export Router, all middleware, AppError, Request/Response/NextFunction types
Create packages/server/src/router.ts - Extract the Router class (register, match, pathToRegex) from apps/quantchat/api/middleware/index.ts as the canonical implementation
Create packages/server/src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - Most complete version from quantmail with skipFailedRequests option
Create packages/server/src/middleware/cors.ts - Unified CorsOptions interface with origins, credentials, maxAge, exposedHeaders. Fix the string[] vs CorsOptions mismatch
Create packages/server/src/middleware/security.ts - securityHeaders (consistent X-Frame-Options: DENY), requestIdMiddleware
Create packages/server/src/middleware/logging.ts - loggingMiddleware with request timing
Create packages/server/src/middleware/error-handler.ts - errorHandler and AppError class
Create packages/server/src/middleware/auth.ts - authMiddleware that imports and uses TokenService.validateAccessToken from @quant/auth for proper JWT signature verification
Create packages/server/src/types.ts - Request, Response, NextFunction, Middleware types (the express-like interfaces)
Rewrite apps/quantchat/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server and re-export with app-specific config (rate limits, CORS origins)
Rewrite apps/quantmail/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantmail-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantsync/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantsync-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantads/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantads-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantube/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantube-specific config (fixing the corsMiddleware signature)
Rewrite apps/quantneon/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantneon-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantedits/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantedits-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantmax/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantmax-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantai/api/middleware/index.ts to import from @quant/server with quantai-specific config
Rewrite apps/quantchat/api/services/ai-service.ts to delegate to ChatAIService from @quant/ai instead of reimplementing
Rewrite apps/quantsync/api/services/ai-service.ts to delegate to ContentAIService from @quant/ai
Rewrite apps/quantneon/api/services/ai-service.ts to delegate to ContentAIService and RecommendationAIService from @quant/ai
Rewrite apps/quantube/api/services/ai-service.ts to delegate to RecommendationAIService from @quant/ai
Rewrite apps/quantmax/api/services/ai-service.ts to delegate to RecommendationAIService from @quant/ai
Update root package.json workspaces to include packages/server
Update root tsconfig.json paths to include @quant/server mapping
acceptance_criteria: packages/server/ exists with complete Router, middleware, and types exported
All 9 app middleware files import from @quant/server instead of copy-pasting implementations
Auth middleware in all apps uses TokenService.validateAccessToken for proper JWT signature verification
corsMiddleware has consistent CorsOptions interface across all apps including QuantTube
App AI services delegate to @quant/ai package services instead of reimplementing
No duplicate Router class definitions across the codebase
verification: Run: grep -l '@quant/ai' /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem/apps/*/api/services/ai-service.ts | wc -l (should be at least 5)
findings: All 9 app middleware files now import from @quant/server. Auth uses TokenService.validateAccessToken for real JWT signature verification. 5 AI services delegate to @quant/ai. node scripts/test.js passes (must use NODE_OPTIONS='' to avoid proxy-bootstrap error). packages/server has 9 TypeScript files with complete implementations.
